results.title: Pru Life UK's marks 30th Philippine anniversary with 'Pop Run'
results.description: Thousands of runners are expected to participate in the Pru Pop Run set in August, which will celebrate Pru Life UK’s 30th year in the Philippines.

results.title: UALR offcially joins the United Athletic Conference
results.description: The University of Arkansas at Little Rock completed its formal transition into the United Athletic Conference with a celebration to mark the occasion Wednesday night at the Governor's Mansion in Little Rock.

results.title: International Isotopes (OTCMKTS:INIS) Stock Crosses Below 200 Day Moving Average – Here’s What Happened
results.description: International Isotopes Inc. (OTCMKTS:INIS – Get Free Report)’s share price crossed below its two hundred day moving average during trading on Wednesday . The stock has a two hundred day moving average of $0.08 and traded as low as $0.0655. International Isotopes shares last traded at $0.0714, with a volume of 20,802 shares changing hands. [...]
